label: Emporio Italia
product: Arrigoni Formaggi - Gorgonzola DOP Dolce Linea Castelregio 1/8 ~1,5kg
question: Why did Gorgonzola regress from €0 (v26/refinement) to €13.56 (v27 residual-error audit run)?

verdict.label: GPT_variance
verdict.summary: The €13.56 appears only on an unlucky v27 single-run draw. Fresh 5-run v27 stability shows 4/5 runs with correct total €13.44 (€0 financial error). v26/refinement €0 baselines reflect the same underlying Pass C variance pattern where VALOR is usually copied correctly; the audit run broke total stability by emitting qty×unit (2×13.5=27) instead of Preço Total 13,44.

A_deterministic_regression.hypothesis: v27 prompt change deterministically broke Gorgonzola on every invoke
evidence: v26 single run and refinement both €0 on same invoice image
Bad v27 audit run is outlier vs majority of v27 invokes

B_gpt_variance.hypothesis: Pass C non-determinism on Emporio weight/discount rows causes intermittent total misread
evidence: v23 discount-accuracy: Gorgonzola PARTIAL — total stable 13.44 across 2/2 runs, qty variable (1 or 2)
v27-stability: qty always wrong (2 or 2.6) but total correct 80% of runs
v27 audit bad run: total 27 = 2×13.5 (classic qty×unit synthesis, not VALOR copy)
v27-stability run 5 tail: total 33.14 (second failure mode)
Name OCR varies every run (Castelli, Castiglieri, Castelfrigo…) — same row, unstable GPT read

C_gt_issue.hypothesis: Ground truth wrong; visible invoice differs from GT total
evidence: Good extraction runs (v26, refinement, 4/5 v27) all hit total 13.44

quantity.note: Often misread as 2 (description 1/8 ~1,5kg confusion); persists even on €0 runs

unit_price.note: Wrong column or implied net when total breaks

exactFieldChanged.mechanismOnBadRun: Pass C read qty≈2 and unit≈13.5, then set line_total_net to qty×unit (27) instead of copying VALOR 13,44 €

firstFailingStage.binderObserved: pass-through — wrong total already present from Pass C

rankedCandidates.label: Pre-existing Emporio weight-row + dense-table column-shift variance
rankedCandidates.rationale: Failure predates v27; v23 already showed qty 1/2 variance with total usually stable. Bad audit run is tail where total also broke.

rankedCandidates.label: Total column isolation (Ovo/Nata examples)
rankedCandidates.rationale: Added to stop gross_unit_price→line_total_net bleed. 4/5 v27 stability runs copied VALOR 13.44 correctly. Bad run violated this rule (computed 27), not caused by it.

rankedCandidates.label: Chocolate row isolation
rankedCandidates.rationale: Targets adjacent-row monetary bleed (Aviludo); Gorgonzola failure is same-row qty/total misread.

rankedCandidates.label: Ventricina / Desc.(%) Emporio hardening
rankedCandidates.rationale: Helps discount_pct disambiguation; Gorgonzola bad run did not bleed discount into unit — it doubled qty and synthesized total.

rankedCandidates.label: Emporio discount hardening
rankedCandidates.rationale: Same family as v25; discount_pct still null on many Emporio rows but total 13.44 stable on majority runs.

confidenceRationale: Visible invoice and GT agree; 5-run v27 probe disproves deterministic v27 regression; historical v23 partial stability supports long-standing variance; 12% reserved for unmeasured prompt interaction and small sample size.

promptActions: Add Emporio POSITIVE example: fractional kg row with Desc.(%) and VALOR — Gorgonzola pattern (Qtd 1,35 · Preço Unit 12,90 · Desc 22,85 · Preço Total 13,44)
Reinforce: line_total_net must be copied from Preço Total even when qty is misread; never qty×unit when VALOR visible
Negative example: qty 2 × unit 13,50 ≠ 27 when Preço Total prints 13,44
binderActions: Optional: when gross×qty differs from line_total_net by >15%, prefer line_total_net from Pass C (low priority — Pass C usually supplies total)

expectedImprovementNote: Full €13.56 recovers when total stabilizes to 13.44 on every run. Current v27 stability already achieves €0 on 80% of invokes; targeted prompt should push toward 95%+ and eliminate tail (run 5 €19.70).
